carousel_welcome_text: Your corner of flavor and tranquility in Estepona.
carousel_breakfast_text: Enjoy our specialty coffee and typical Spanish breakfast.
carousel_location_text: Next to the Orchidarium, with views of beautiful gardens.
welcome_title: Flavor and Passion in the Heart of Estepona
welcome_text: We invite you to discover a place where the tradition of Spanish food meets a cozy and familiar atmosphere. Perfect for every moment of the day.
footer_description: Your meeting place in Estepona. Breakfasts, lunches, dinners, and the best atmosphere.
footer_copyright: © 2025 Las Orquídeas Cafeteria - All rights reserved.
cookie_banner_text: This website uses cookies. We use cookies to personalize content and ads, provide social media features, and analyze our traffic. We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising, and analytics partners.
about_subtitle: A Bulgarian adventure in the heart of the Costa del Sol.
about_p1: We are friends from Bulgaria who, during a trip through beautiful Andalusia, fell head over heels in love with Estepona. Its flowery streets, its friendly people, and the incredible Mediterranean light captivated us. One day, walking near the impressive Orchidarium, we discovered a place with enormous potential: Las Orquídeas Cafeteria.
about_p2: We decided to take a risk and embark on the adventure of a lifetime. With the dream of merging our passion for good food and excellent service, we took the reins of the cafeteria. Our dream is to create a cozy space where locals and visitors can enjoy authentic Spanish tapas, energizing breakfasts, and memorable dinners, all in a family atmosphere with a touch of our Bulgarian hospitality.
about_p3: Today, Las Orquídeas is our home, and we want it to be yours too. We are waiting for you!
services_subtitle: Everything you need to enjoy, from morning to night.
services_breakfast_text: Start your day with energy or take a sweet break. We offer specialty coffee, assorted toasts, fresh pastries, and homemade cakes.
services_lunch_text: Discover the authentic taste of Spain with our lunch menu and a wide variety of tapas. Perfect for sharing and enjoying!
services_dinner_text: At night, our atmosphere transforms. Ideal for a relaxed dinner or to celebrate your special events. Birthdays, meetings... we adapt to you!
opening_hours_text: We are open for you every day from 8:00 AM to 1:00 AM.
opening_hours_extra: We have a large indoor space and an outdoor terrace with garden views, perfect for any celebration.
contact_subtitle: We look forward to welcoming you. Find us!
contact_location_text: We are in a privileged location in Estepona, right next to the famous Orchidarium.
contact_message_text: For any inquiries or reservations, do not hesitate to contact us.
gallery_subtitle: A visual tour of our corners, dishes, and special moments.
menu_subtitle: Here is a selection of our specialties to whet your appetite. We look forward to seeing you at the cafeteria to discover the full menu!

privacy_policy_p1: At Cafetería Las Orquídeas, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit our website.
privacy_policy_p2_info: We collect personal information that you provide to us when you register on our site, place an order, or interact with us in other ways. This information may include your name, email address, phone number, and payment details.
privacy_policy_p3_use: We use your information to process orders, improve our customer service, send promotional communications, and personalize your experience on our site.
privacy_policy_p4_protection: We implement a variety of security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy_policy_p5_cookies: We use cookies to enhance your experience on our site. You can configure your cookie preferences in the corresponding section of our website.
privacy_policy_p6_sharing: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except where necessary to comply with the law or protect our rights.
privacy_policy_p7_rights: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also opt out of receiving promotional communications at any time.
privacy_policy_p8_changes: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy at any time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on our website.
privacy_policy_p9_contact: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us via our email cafeterialasorquideasestepona@gmail.com, Calle Salvador Dalí 2, Estepona, Málaga.
cookies_config_p1: You can choose which types of cookies you allow on this website. Your preferences will be saved for future visits. Functional cookies are necessary for the proper functioning of the site and cannot be disabled.
cookies_config_functional_text: These cookies are essential for the website to function correctly.
cookies_config_analytics_text: They help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting information anonymously.
cookies_config_advertising_text: They are used to display ads that are relevant to you and your interests.
cookie_info_p_what: We use our own and third-party cookies to improve the user experience. For more details, see our Privacy Policy.
cookie_info_h2_how: How can you disable or configure cookies?
cookie_info_p_how: You can disable or configure cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to reject cookies or accept only certain cookies. For more information on how to manage cookies, consult your browser's documentation.
cookie_info_p_consent: By using our website, you agree to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree to the use of cookies, you must adjust your browser settings or stop using our site. For more details, see our Privacy Policy.
